reviews.comment:
Lo más año a año esi lugar de parar a descansar y estirar las piernas, cargas nafta y agua del mate. Gracias a los empleados por su siempre amabilidad

(Translated by Google)
The best part year after year is that it's the place to stop and rest, stretch your legs, fill up with gas and water for mate. Thanks to the employees for their constant kindness.

reviews.comment:
Siempre que voy hacia Brasil paso por ahi. Me llamó la atencion que sacaron los merenderos del bosque lateral...que pena.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I go to Brazil, I pass by there. I was surprised to see they removed the picnic tables from the wooded area...what a shame.
